landing.heroSubtitle: The modern, multilingual resume builder designed to help you land your dream job. Real-time preview, expert templates, and seamless PDF export.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to craft a standout resume.
landing.featurePreviewDesc: No more "Download to See." Changes reflect instantly in a pixel-perfect PDF preview as you type.
landing.featureBlocksDesc: Use intuitive drag-and-drop blocks to build your story. Reorder sections in seconds.
landing.featureLanguagesDesc: Switch between languages with one click. Target any language you want.
landing.featureShareDesc: Generate a public link to your resume in one click. Share it with recruiters or on LinkedIn!
landing.featureHistoryDesc: Never lose a great bullet point again. Browse past edits and restore any version with a single click.
landing.featureTrashDesc: Accidentally deleted a resume? Use the 3-day recovery window to bring it back.
landing.howHeading: From Blank Page to Interview Ready
landing.howSubtitle: Forget formatting headaches and focus on showcasing your true potential.
landing.howStep1Desc: Choose from our selection of templates. Optimized to beat the ATS.
landing.howStep2Desc: Add your details using our structured forms. Reorder sections with simple drag-and-drop.
landing.howStep3Desc: Export a high-resolution PDF or share your unique web link.
landing.howDemoReadyDesc: Your professional resume has been successfully generated.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Flexible pricing whether you are casually browsing or actively hunting.
landing.pricingFreeDesc: The basic features you need to get your foot in the door.
landing.pricingProDesc: Full access to all premium features and analytics to stand out.
landing.faqFreeA: Yes, you can create and download one professional resume for free, forever.
landing.faqAtsA: Our templates use clean, semantic HTML that ATS systems parse well. We recommend customizing content with job-specific keywords for best results.
landing.faqCancelQ: Can I cancel my Pro subscription?
landing.faqCancelA: Yes, you can manage and cancel your subscription anytime through your account settings.
landing.footerCtaDesc: Join the professionals who have leveled up their career with Civy!

sidebar.appearanceDesc: Customize the appearance of your resume.
sidebar.chooseTemplateDesc: Select a template to change the layout and styling of your resume.
sidebar.limitFree: Free users can only save 2 templates. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited templates.
sidebar.limitPro: You have reached the maximum limit of 50 custom templates.
sidebar.saveError: Failed to save template. Please try again.
sidebar.lowContrast: Low contrast ({ratio}:1). Consider adjusting colors for readability.
sidebar.sectionGuideDesc: These are the default section types you can add to your resume. Each one comes pre-filled with starter content to help you get going.

dashboard.title: My Resumes
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first resume to get started
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this resume?
dashboard.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to Pro to create unlimited resumes and access premium templates.
dashboard.trashEmptyDescription: Deleted resumes appear here for 3 days before being permanently removed.
dashboard.emptyFolderDesc: There are no resumes in this folder.
dashboard.organizeCollections: Organize your resumes into separate collections.
dashboard.renameFolderDesc: Update the name of this folder.
dashboard.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? Your resumes will not be deleted, they will just be moved out of this folder.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Set up your first resume with our guided onboarding or start from scratch.
tips: Use action verbs like "led", "developed", or "implemented" instead of passive language.
Keep your resume to 1-2 pages. Recruiters spend about 6 seconds scanning.
Quantify achievements with numbers: "Increased sales by 30%" is stronger than "Increased sales".
Tailor your resume to each job by matching keywords from the job description.
Place your most relevant achievements at the top of each section.
Use a clean, professional layout. Avoid fonts or graphics that distract from content.
Proofread twice. A single typo can cost you an interview.
Include a professional summary at the top highlighting your key qualifications.
List skills relevant to the position, not every tool you have ever used.
Save your resume as a PDF to preserve formatting across devices.

settings.profileDescription: Manage your display name and account information.

settings.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account, all resumes, and cancel any active subscription.
